name: Functional - Summarize Meeting with Valid Transcript
description: Validates that the /summarize endpoint returns a successful summary when provided with a valid transcript and user email.
input: POST /summarize with SummarizeMeetingRequest containing a valid transcript_text, summary_length='full', and a valid user_email.
output: SummarizeMeetingResponse with success=True, summary and structured_summary populated, error=None.
